name: NorthPoint Lending Group Inc.
description_short: Chicago-based mortgage broker established in 1995, offering conventional, jumbo, FHA, and non-QM loans through a network of lenders serving the Illinois area.
description_long:
NorthPoint Lending Group, Inc. is a mortgage broker headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, with an established presence since 1995. The company operates from their primary office at 7434 N Harlem Ave in Chicago, with service coverage extending to Park Ridge and Glenview. Over nearly three decades, they have positioned themselves as a local mortgage professional focusing on personalized service and comprehensive loan solutions.

The company offers a diverse range of mortgage products including conventional loans, jumbo loans, non-QM loans, and bridge loans for home purchases. Their refinance programs include FHA Streamline, conventional refinancing, and jumbo refinancing options. They also provide specialized loan products such as self-employed loans, bank statement loans, first-time homebuyer programs, and investor loans. Their online platform features mortgage calculators and a streamlined 12-minute application process to help borrowers estimate their financing options.

NorthPoint distinguishes itself through direct community presence with loan officers described as embedded in local communities, a comprehensive lender network designed to provide competitive rates, and tailored products addressing specific borrower circumstances (self-employed, first-time buyers, investors). They emphasize personalized consultation and free quote requests, positioning themselves as an alternative to direct lenders through their broker model.

The primary caveat is limited transparency regarding specific rates, terms, approval timelines, or lending standards from the website alone. As a mortgage broker rather than a direct lender, borrowers should understand they're working through an intermediary connecting them to multiple lenders. No third-party reviews, ratings, or licensing verification are visible on their website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Established 29-year track record since 1995 demonstrating longevity in the market
Offers specialized loan products for non-traditional borrowers including self-employed individuals and bank statement loans
Maintains local presence with loan officers in three specific communities (Chicago, Park Ridge, Glenview) for personalized service
Provides comprehensive loan program options including jumbo loans up to $2M+ and bridge financing
Offers free quote requests and 12-minute online application for convenience
Covers both purchase and refinance scenarios with multiple program types (conventional, FHA, non-QM)
Provides mortgage calculators to help borrowers explore options before applying
cons: Website contains no specific interest rates, APRs, or fee information to enable rate shopping
No third-party reviews, ratings, or Better Business Bureau details visible to assess customer satisfaction
Broker model means rates and terms depend on multiple underlying lenders—final pricing transparency unclear
Limited information about approval timelines, qualification criteria, or credit score requirements
No documentation of licensing status or regulatory credentials displayed on website
best_for: First-time homebuyers in the Chicago metropolitan area seeking personalized guidance
Self-employed individuals and those with non-traditional income seeking bank statement or non-QM loans
High-net-worth borrowers seeking jumbo loans and bridge financing options
Borrowers refinancing existing mortgages with various loan program preferences
diagnosis: Best for local Chicago-area borrowers seeking personalized mortgage guidance, particularly those with non-traditional income or jumbo loan needs. The main caveat is that borrowers must contact the company directly for pricing and terms, as no rate information is published online—comparison shopping requires outreach to multiple sources.
services: Conventional loan origination for home purchase
FHA loans and FHA Streamline refinancing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
